text.title: Multi-Agent Production Bus Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to emit a validated multi-agent-system spec.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Enumerate roles. Parse `templates/_smoke-test.yaml`. Per agent record: name, role, model, budget_tokens.
Step 2 — Pick strategy. Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Compute drivers (subtasks_independent, chain_shape). Pick leaf r-sequential / r-parallel / r-hierarchical.

Step 3 — Wire bus. Drop `templates/message-bus.py` + `templates/production-system.py`. Verify all handlers are wrapped in asyncio.wait_for(handler, timeout=handler_timeout_seconds) (r2). Confirm BROADCAST excludes sender (r3).
Step 4 — Set budgets. Per agent: budget_tokens. Per run: per_run_token_cap = sum(budgets) × safety_factor (1.2 typical). Wire bus.run abort path on breach (r5).
Step 5 — Tag observability. Wire agentops or LangSmith. Tag every LLM call with agent.role + current strategy (r6). Run `scripts/validate-multi-agent-production-bus.py spec.json`.
